description:
Clears the value of the given entity's [[Eden_Editor:_Entity_Attributes|attribute]] in [[:Category:Eden Editor|Eden Editor]]. An attribute is identified by its {{hl|property}} ({{hl|data}} when it is engine-drive attribute) value in config. For the list of all attributes with their properties, see [[Eden_Editor:_Setting_Attributes#Attributes|Setting Attributes]].

{{Feature|important|Attributes are available only within the Eden Editor workspace. You cannot access them in scenario preview or exported scenario!}}
name: clear3DENAttribute
